title: Burkilliodendron album
taxonomy: Burkilliodendron album is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in the tropical rainforests of Malaysia. As a member of the Dipterocarpaceae family, it is classified as a type of tropical hardwood tree. The species was named after its discoverer, the British botanist Isaac Henry Burkill, who first described it in the early 20th century. Further classification of Burkilliodendron album places it within the genus Burkilliodendron.
